items.title: Investigate online/offline metric gap — model over-confident
items.evidence: nDCG@5 offline = 0.7454, CTR online = 0.2535, gap = -0.2885 (model over-confident). Model scores are systematically biased vs actual user behaviour.

items.title: Ensure 100% prediction logging with model version + feature snapshot
items.evidence: Without complete prediction logging, debugging online/offline gaps in future sprints is impossible. Currently logging all scored pairs but feature snapshots at serving time need to be persisted separately to enable reproducible skew detection.

items.title: Fix train/serve skew in features: skill_score_feature, verified_skills, skill_gap, years_exp, model_score
items.evidence: KS test detects distribution shift in 5 features. Worst affected model version: v1.2 (mean_skew=0.081). Skew accounts for a portion of the 0.288 online/offline gap.

items.title: Improve matching quality for college_tier=2 (lowest CTR segment)
items.evidence: college_tier=2 has CTR=0.2455 — the worst-performing segment. This may reflect fairness issues carried from the bias audit (Task 21/24).

items.title: Remediate 'false_positive' defects in recommendation ranking
items.evidence: 1087 'false_positive' defects detected, mean user impact = 0.476. Mean defect rank = 1070 (lower = hurts more users).

items.title: Remediate 'skew_induced' defects in recommendation ranking
items.evidence: 642 'skew_induced' defects detected, mean user impact = 0.500. Mean defect rank = 1061 (lower = hurts more users).

items.title: Remediate 'false_negative' defects in recommendation ranking
items.evidence: 120 'false_negative' defects detected, mean user impact = 0.431. Mean defect rank = 1396 (lower = hurts more users).
